staking_method: flat 5% of settled bankroll (one-off override; quarter-Kelly would have given EUR1.04 at full-Kelly fraction 0.036 — see note)
note: One-off sizing exception: staked at flat 5% cap instead of the quarter-Kelly rule used on bets #1-#3, per explicit user override on 2026-07-01.
